title: state scribing-run --show [--feature]: read-only last-stamp read (no append, no phase advance)
action: Add --show to state scribing-run: when --show is passed the verb is READ-ONLY (no ledger append, no phase advance) and returns the most-recent stamp overall, or for --feature <slug>. Reuse readScribingLedger/scribingLedgerPath (cells.mjs:2081-2087) and the bestStampMs per-feature max. Register the flag in command-registry.mjs. Then run the regen sequence INSIDE this cell in order: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, then node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply, then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write.

truths: --show never appends and never advances phase
artifacts: test in test_cli_state.mjs asserting --show reads last stamp and leaves ledger+phase untouched
prohibitions: INSERT the --show read-only branch BEFORE rejectDryRun/requireFlags (bee.mjs ~2343-2349) — else requireFlags refuses --show for lacking --areas/--next-action
--show must not advance phase to compounding

trace.outcome: Added a READ-ONLY --show flag to state scribing-run: --show (optionally with --feature <slug>) returns the most-recent scribing stamp -- overall or for one feature -- with no ledger append and no phase advance. The read-only branch returns at the very top of handleStateScribingRun, above rejectDryRun/requireFlags, so --show never needs --areas/--next-action. Reuses readScribingLedger and a newly-extracted bestScribingStampMs (both exported from cells.mjs, the latter factored out of globalScribingDebt's per-feature max-stamp logic) instead of a second reader. Registered --show in command-registry.mjs and FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS. Regenerated all skill-tree mirrors, onboarding hash ledger, and the release manifest.

deviations.detail: Edited skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/cells.mjs (not in the cell's declared `files` list) to (a) export the previously-private `readScribingLedger`, and (b) extract the per-feature max-stamp logic out of `globalScribingDebt`'s local `bestStampMs` closure into a new exported `bestScribingStampMs(root, feature, ctx)`, with `globalScribingDebt` refactored to call it (behavior-identical, covered by the existing test_cells.mjs/test_cli_cells.mjs green run). This was required to satisfy the cell's own must-have: reuse readScribingLedger + the bestStampMs logic instead of a second reader implementation in bee.mjs. Mirrors of cells.mjs were already declared cap targets via the regen sequence.

Added 'show' to bee.mjs's FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS set. Without it, `--show` (not followed by `=value`) would consume the NEXT token as its own value -- e.g. `--show --feature demo` would bind 'demo'-adjacent `--feature` as --show's value and leave 'demo' as a stray positional argument (confirmed live in red-first evidence: `unexpected argument "demo"`). Same class of fix as the pre-existing dry-run/write/as-lane entries in that same set.

  "tests_added_or_changed": [

    "bee.mjs CLI: \"state scribing-run --show\" is read-only -- it does not append to the ledger and does not advance phase",
    "bee.mjs CLI: \"state scribing-run --show\" works with NO --areas/--next-action (a bare read never needs write-only flags)",
    "bee.mjs CLI: \"--help --json\" advertises scribing-run --show"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before implementation: `node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_state.mjs` reported `68 passed, 5 failed`. The 4 behavioral checks failed exactly on the trap this cell targets: `--show should succeed, got 1: missing required flag(s): --feature, --areas, --next-action` (rejectDryRun/requireFlags ran before the read-only branch existed) and, once --feature was added to the call, `unexpected argument \"demo\"` (--show was not yet in FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS, so it consumed --feature as its own value). The registry-advertisement check failed with `state.scribing-run's registry entry must declare a --show flag, got [\"feature\",\"areas\",\"next-action\",\"lane\",\"json\"]`.",
  "verification_run": "After implementation: `node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_state.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check` -> `73 passed, 0 failed`; `release_manifest --check: 510 file(s) match stored manifest`; `ledger_parity --check: .bee/bin/** matches the .bee/onboarding.json managed-hash ledger`. Also ran test_cells.mjs (107 passed) and test_cli_cells.mjs (40 passed) as a regression check on the cells.mjs refactor (bestScribingStampMs extraction) -- both green, no behavior change to globalScribingDebt."
}
